scripts.build:wasm: pnpm run build:wasm:web && pnpm run build:wasm:node
scripts.build:ts: pnpm run build:ts:esm && pnpm run build:ts:cjs
scripts.build: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build:wasm:web && pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run copy:wasm && pnpm run build:wasm:node && pnpm run copy:wasm:node && pnpm run rename:esm
scripts.example:sine:dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run example:sine:install && pnpm --dir examples/sine run dev
scripts.example:sine:build: pnpm run build && pnpm run example:sine:install && pnpm --dir examples/sine run build
scripts.example:multiple-axes:dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run example:multiple-axes:install && pnpm --dir examples/multiple-axes run dev
scripts.example:multiple-axes:build: pnpm run build && pnpm run example:multiple-axes:install && pnpm --dir examples/multiple-axes run build
